final_plan:
#Task1: Identify the relevant sensors for monitoring condenser Water side fouling failure for Chiller 9.
#Agent1: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: List of relevant sensors for monitoring condenser Water side fouling failure for Chiller 9.

#Task2: Download historical sensor data for the identified relevant sensors for Chiller 9 from 2020-04-20T12:30:00 to 2020-05-12T19:30:00.
#Agent2: IoT Data Download
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Historical sensor data for Chiller 9 for the specified period and sensors.

#Task3: Analyze the retrieved data to identify any anomalies or operation violations that can be associated with condenser Water side fouling.
#Agent3: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Analysis report indicating any anomalies or operation violations in the data.

#Task4: Generate a work order recommendation for Chiller 9 if anomalous behavior is detected and no corrective work order exists.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: Work order recommendation for Chiller 9 if necessary.
